after childbirth weight of uterus = 1 kg: Puerperium = period 6-8 weeks after delivery [ puer = Latin, boy + parere , Latin = to bear; puerpera = a woman in childbed] ◊  Timing of uterine involution ›  prolonged in multiparous women ›  foreshortened in preterm delivery ›  not affected by birth weight / breast feeding
heterogeneous myometrium of higher echogenicity compared to nongravid uterus
